central-app/autentikasi/lupa-kata-sandi.title: Forgot Password
central-app/autentikasi/lupa-kata-sandi.description: If you forget the SSO Cendekia account password used to log in to Gradynex, use the reset process below.

central-app/dasar/berlangganan.title: Subscribe
central-app/dasar/berlangganan.description: To subscribe, you must meet several requirements first.

central-app/dasar/data-sekolah.title: School Data
central-app/dasar/data-sekolah.description: If you have just created an account via SSO Cendekia, you are required to fill in your school data the first time you use Gradynex.

central-app/dasar/trial.title: Trial
central-app/dasar/trial.description: Gradynex offers a 14-day free trial package for new users who want to try our service.

central-app/intro.title: Central Application Documentation
central-app/intro.description: Welcome to the central application documentation page. This page will explain the various methods in the Gradynex system, especially the central application / application that manages your subscription or your school website.

central-app/memulai.title: Getting Started
central-app/memulai.description: To start using Gradynex quickly, follow the steps below.

help-center/faq.title: Questions and Answers (FAQ)
help-center/faq.description: This page contains frequently asked questions about Gradynex and their solutions.

help-center/troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting
help-center/troubleshooting.description: This page contains solutions to common problems you may encounter while using Gradynex.

index.title: Gradynex
index.description: This page is the main entry point to Gradynex documentation.

intro.title: WELCOME
intro.description: Welcome to the PT Scholar Digital Solusi documentation portal.

tenant-app/admin-panel/blog/berita.title: News
tenant-app/admin-panel/blog/berita.description: News is a feature for writing and publishing dynamic content to public pages of school websites.

tenant-app/admin-panel/blog/halaman.title: Page
tenant-app/admin-panel/blog/halaman.description: Pages are static content on your school website that are suitable for content that rarely changes.

tenant-app/admin-panel/blog/kategori.title: Category
tenant-app/admin-panel/blog/kategori.description: Categories are used to group blog content. Think of categories like “bookshelf” for news and articles.

tenant-app/admin-panel/blog/komentar.title: Comment
tenant-app/admin-panel/blog/komentar.description: Comments is where you manage visitor responses to News or Pages.

tenant-app/admin-panel/blog/README.title: Blogs & News
tenant-app/admin-panel/blog/README.description: The Blog module allows you to manage and publish content to the public pages of the school website.

tenant-app/admin-panel/blog/slider-gamba.title: Image Slider
tenant-app/admin-panel/blog/slider-gamba.description: The Image Slider page manages a list of slider images that appear on public pages (for example on the school website homepage).

tenant-app/admin-panel/blog/tag.title: Tags
tenant-app/admin-panel/blog/tag.description: Tags are "little labels" for articles. If Category is a bookshelf, Tag is a topic sticker.

tenant-app/admin-panel/dashboard-admin.title: Admin Dashboard
tenant-app/admin-panel/dashboard-admin.description: Admin Dashboard is the main page in the admin panel. Here you can see a summary of important information and quick access to school management features.

tenant-app/admin-panel/pengaturan/blog/p.title: Discussion Settings
tenant-app/admin-panel/pengaturan/blog/p.description: Discussion Settings manages comments on blog articles. This setting becomes default for new articles.

tenant-app/admin-panel/pengaturan/blog/p.title: Reading Settings
tenant-app/admin-panel/pengaturan/blog/p.description: Reading Settings sets how the blog displays the list of articles. These settings affect the overall appearance and performance of the blog page.

tenant-app/admin-panel/pengaturan/blog/R.title: Blog Settings
tenant-app/admin-panel/pengaturan/blog/R.description: This module manages the configuration for the blog feature on the school website.

tenant-app/admin-panel/pengaturan/pengat.title: Email Server Settings
tenant-app/admin-panel/pengaturan/pengat.description: The Email Server Settings page determines the email server that the application uses to send automatic emails.

tenant-app/admin-panel/pengaturan/pengat.title: General Settings
tenant-app/admin-panel/pengaturan/pengat.description: General Settings is the basic configuration center for the school website. Here you can set brand identity, basic SEO, time zone, and security (reCAPTCHA).

tenant-app/admin-panel/pengaturan/profil.title: School Profile
tenant-app/admin-panel/pengaturan/profil.description: The School Profile page stores school identity data that is used in various places in the system.

tenant-app/admin-panel/pengaturan/README.title: Arrangement
tenant-app/admin-panel/pengaturan/README.description: The Settings module allows you to configure the system according to your school's needs.

tenant-app/admin-panel/pengguna.title: User
tenant-app/admin-panel/pengguna.description: The Users page is used to manage accounts that can log into the Tenant system.

tenant-app/admin-panel/peran.title: Roles / Access Rights
tenant-app/admin-panel/peran.description: The Role page is used to set user roles in the application. Roles determine what menus and actions the user can access.

tenant-app/admin-panel/tampilan/menu.title: Menu
tenant-app/admin-panel/tampilan/menu.description: The Menu page is used to manage school website navigation. You can manage menus for Header and Footer (or other available variants).

tenant-app/admin-panel/tampilan/modul.title: Module
tenant-app/admin-panel/tampilan/modul.description: The Module page is used to activate or deactivate features available on the school website.

tenant-app/admin-panel/tampilan/README.title: Appearance / Theme
tenant-app/admin-panel/tampilan/README.description: The Appearance module allows you to manage the visuals and layout of the school website.

tenant-app/admin-panel/tampilan/tema.title: Theme
tenant-app/admin-panel/tampilan/tema.description: The Theme page is used to choose the appearance/design of the school website. A theme manages the layout, visual components, colors, and overall style of a website.

tenant-app/autentikasi/lupa-kata-sandi.title: Forgot Password
tenant-app/autentikasi/lupa-kata-sandi.description: If you forget your Gradynex tenant account password, use the following reset process.

tenant-app/autentikasi/masuk.title: How to Enter (Login)
tenant-app/autentikasi/masuk.description: To access the Gradynex tenant application, you need to have a registered account. If you don't have an account, contact your school administrator.

tenant-app/intro.title: Tenant Application Documentation
tenant-app/intro.description: Welcome to the tenant application documentation page. This page will explain the various methods available in the Gradynex system, especially the tenant applications / applications that are accessed for your school.

tenant-app/user-panel/dashboard.title: User Dashboard
tenant-app/user-panel/dashboard.description: User Dashboard is the main page once you are successful enter. Here you can see summary information and quick access to key features according to your access rights.
